query:
UPDATE position_requisitions SET positionTitle = 'Real Estate Manager (Georgia)' WHERE positionTitle LIKE '%Real Estate Manager%State A%';

UPDATE position_requisitions SET positionTitle = 'Real Estate Manager (North Carolina)' WHERE positionTitle LIKE '%Real Estate Manager%State B%';
